title: aster salsuginosus var. scaposus
intro: Aster salsuginosus var. scaposus, also known as Western Mountain Aster, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Aster salsuginosus var. scaposus include relieving congestion, coughs, and colds, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
